title: Create in-memory todo model
body: Implement todo entity shape and repository helpers for create/list/update/delete.

title: Add create and list endpoints
body: Expose POST /todos and GET /todos in sample app with input validation.

title: Implement complete and reopen endpoints
body: Add PATCH endpoints for complete/reopen transitions and validate state rules.

title: Add filter support for status
body: Support query param filtering for open and completed todo views.

title: Add test coverage for todo API
body: Write tests for create/list/update/delete and invalid input behavior.
